title: Curation
description: Value-adding, organizational, presentational, and preservation activities to establish, increase, and sustain the value of Earth observation data over its lifecycle.

definitions.definition: Value-adding, organizational, presentational, and preservation activities to establish, increase, and sustain the value of Earth observation data over its lifecycle.
